claims.statement: UniFirst flags as a risk that U.S. and foreign trade policies, including the assessment of tariffs and other impositions on imported goods, may have a material adverse impact on its business.
claims.quote: U.S. and foreign trade policies, including the assessment of tariffs and other impositions on imported goods, may have a material adverse impact on our business.

claims.statement: This is not a clean operational bolt-on: the two run opposite supply models — UniFirst self-manufactures ~62% of garments at owned Mexico/Nicaragua plants while Cintas outsources and runs only five plants — so Cintas would acquire captive manufacturing it deliberately chose not to own, plus inherited tariff/import exposure and a second sourcing-and-IT stack to integrate.
The $310.00 combined value was based on Cintas' closing share price of $200.77 on March 9, 2026 ($155.00 cash plus 0.7720 x $200.77).
claims.quote: This represents a combined value of $310.00 per share based on Cintas’ closing share price of $200.77 on March 9, 2026.
claims.locator: Press release, 'Transaction Details' section, dated March 11, 2026

claims.statement: The $310.00 consideration represents a premium of approximately 102.5% to the proxy's stated unaffected price of $153.05 (310.00 / 153.05 - 1 = 1.025), i.e. roughly a double-up; this headline premium is measured against a Nov 11, 2025 price that itself post-dates Cintas's publicly-disclosed Jan 2025 $275 approach, so the unaffected baseline may already embed takeover speculation.

J.P. Morgan's Public Trading Multiples analysis applied a reference range of 8.0x – 10.0x EV/2026E Adjusted EBITDA (Pre-Stock Based Compensation) for UniFirst and indicated an implied per-share equity value range of $147.00 to $182.00.
claims.quote: EBITDA (Pre-Stock Based Compensation) $147.00 $182.00 The range of implied per share equity values for UniFirst common stock was compared to (i) the unaffected closing share price of UniFirst common stock of $153.05 on November 11, 2025
claims.locator: The Mergers — Opinion of J.P. Morgan, Public Trading Multiples (p. 55)

claims.statement: J.P. Morgan's Selected Transactions analysis applied a FV/LTM EBITDA reference range of 11.7x to 14.2x for UniFirst, indicating an implied equity value range of approximately $215.50 to $260.00 per share.
claims.quote: The analysis indicated a range of implied equity value per share of UniFirst common stock (rounded to the nearest $0.50) of approximately $215.50 to $260.00, which J.P.
claims.locator: The Mergers — Opinion of J.P. Morgan, Selected Transactions Analysis (p. 56)

claims.statement: J.P. Morgan's Discounted Cash Flow analysis (discount rates 7.50%–8.50%, present value as of February 28, 2026) indicated an implied per-share equity value range of $193.00 to $266.50 for UniFirst common stock.
claims.quote: this analysis indicated the following ranges of implied per share equity value (rounded to the nearest $0.50) for UniFirst common stock: Implied Per Share Equity Value Low High UniFirst Discounted Cash Flow $193.00 $266.50
claims.locator: The Mergers — Opinion of J.P. Morgan, Discounted Cash Flow Analysis (p. 57)

claims.statement: Goldman Sachs' Illustrative Discounted Cash Flow analysis (discount rate 9.0%, equal to its CAPM estimate of UniFirst's cost of equity) resulted in a range of illustrative present values of $160.00 to $218.00 per share of UniFirst stock.
claims.quote: This analysis resulted in a range of illustrative present values per share of UniFirst stock of $160.00 to $218.00.
claims.locator: The Mergers — Opinion of Goldman Sachs, Illustrative Discounted Cash Flow Analysis (p. 60)

claims.statement: Goldman Sachs' Selected Precedent Transactions analysis (uniform-services deals since 2015) applied an EV/LTM adjusted EBITDA reference range of 11.7x to 14.2x to UniFirst's LTM adjusted EBITDA as of February 26, 2026, deriving a range of implied per-share values of $216.00 to $260.00.
claims.quote: to derive a reference range of implied values per share of UniFirst stock of $216.00 to $260.00.
claims.locator: The Mergers — Opinion of Goldman Sachs, Selected Precedent Transactions Analysis (p. 60)

claims.statement: Applying its 21% to 59% illustrative premium range to the $153.05 undisturbed price (Nov 11, 2025), Goldman Sachs derived implied per-share equity values of $185.00 to $243.00 for UniFirst.
claims.quote: Goldman Sachs applied a reference range of illustrative premiums of 21% to 59% to the undisturbed closing price per share of UniFirst stock of $153.05 as of November 11, 2025 to derive a range of implied equity values per share of UniFirst stock of $185.00 to $243.00.
claims.locator: The Mergers — Opinion of Goldman Sachs, Premia Paid Analysis (p. 61)
